/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--export-dynamic -rdynamic -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/winXPlayer.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/winXPlayer.dir/xplayer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/winXPlayer.dir/u3dplayer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/winXPlayer.dir/U3DViewerX.cpp.o CMakeFiles/winXPlayer.dir/U3DSceneUtilities.cpp.o CMakeFiles/winXPlayer.dir/U3DCameraNavigation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/winXPlayer.dir/IFXOSRenderWindow.cpp.o -o winXPlayer   -L/home/posiedon/Desktop/Coding/DIRECTOR/U3D_OLD/Source/Samples/winXPlayer/../../../../u3d_MODERN/build  -Wl,-rpath,/home/posiedon/Desktop/Coding/DIRECTOR/U3D_OLD/Source/Samples/winXPlayer/../../../../u3d_MODERN/build /usr/lib/libSM.so /usr/lib/libICE.so /usr/lib/libX11.so /usr/lib/libXext.so /usr/lib/libGL.so /usr/lib/libGLU.so /home/posiedon/Desktop/Coding/DIRECTOR/U3D_OLD/Source/Samples/winXPlayer/../../../../u3d_MODERN/build/libIFXCoreStatic.a -lIFXCore -lIFXImporting -lIFXExporting -lIFXScheduling -ldl -lpthread
